instagram.biography:
Vintage Fairs & Markets: LONDON
Tap 🔔 🔝 to stay updated
Mid C20 furniture homeware art brocante fashion & more
Sun 7 June - Dulwich, London SE21 7AD

post_data.caption:
This Sunday - So Last Century’s Summer Vintage Market at Dulwich Picture Gallery
@dulwichgallery 

Lots of amazing vintage stalls filling the landscaped gardens, the Cloisters, Linbury Room and Art Studio. Mid-20thC homeware, ceramics and glass, lighting, furniture, 1950s and 60s original art, prints, posters, maps and charts, French antiques, summer fashion and lots more. There’ll be a florist and plant stall, too. 

🥙🍺🥂Lunch is sorted, with mouth-watering crêpes and galettes by Sarrasin and delicious bao buns, noodles and rice bowls by YouBao. Enjoy a cold draught beer or glass of wine from CAMRA award-winning New Cross pub The Shirker’s Rest who’ll have a stall in the gardens. The Gallery’s excellent cafe and new Canteen will be both be open as well.

🎺 Relax and listen to the brilliant Alvar Treefrogs playing live jazz out in the garden

Sunday 7th June
10.30-5.00pm

🎟️ Free entry
Just turn up on the day, or get an advance ticket here, to beat the queues (link in bio)

👩‍🦽‍➡️level access throughout
🦮 dogs on leads welcome outside (not indoors, sorry)

📍Dulwich Picture Gallery
College Road, London SW21 7AD

🚏 nearest stations:
West Dulwich and North Dulwich.
Free on-street parking nearby and at Belair car park 

#solastcenturyvintagefair #dulwich

🌞Sunday 7th June - So Last Century’s Summer Vintage Market at Dulwich Picture Gallery
@dulwichgallery 

Lots of amazing vintage stalls filling the landscaped gardens, the Cloisters, Linbury Room and Art Studio. You’ll find find plenty of mid-century homeware, ceramics and glass, lighting, furniture, 1950s and 60s original art, prints, antique maps and charts, French antiques, summer fashion and lots more. There’ll be a florist and plant stall as well

🥙🍺🥂Lunch is sorted, with mouth-watering crêpes and galettes by Sarrasin and delicious bao buns, noodles and rice bowls by YouBao. Enjoy a cold draught beer or glass of wine from CAMRA award-winning New Cross pub The Shirker’s Rest who’ll have a stall in the gardens. The Gallery’s excellent cafe and new Canteen will be both be open too, serving food and drinks. 

🎺 Listen to the brilliant Alvar Treefrogs playing live jazz out on the lawns. If you haven’t heard them before, you’re in for a treat!

🎨 While you’re here, visit the Konrad Mägi exhibition and discover his captivating paintings. See the new sculptural installation by contemporary Estonian artist Kristina Õllek, explore DPG’s permanent collection, delve into the Shop, and visit the new Pavilion and sculpture gardens

Sunday 7th June
10.30-5.00pm

🎟️ Free entry
Just turn up on the day, or get an advance ticket here, to beat the queues (link in bio)

👩‍🦽‍➡️level access throughout
🦮 dogs on leads welcome outside (not indoors, sorry)

📍Dulwich Picture Gallery
College Road, London SW21 7AD

🚏 nearest stations:
West Dulwich and North Dulwich.
Free on-street parking nearby and at Belair car park 

Celebrate the start of summer by coming along to Dulwich Picture Gallery on 7th June, and find thousands of beautiful things to buy and lots to see and do

✨Hope you can make it!

#solastcenturyvintagefair #dulwich

Thanks all you lovely people who defied the blistering heat on Bank Holiday Monday and came out to Vintage Market at the Mansion in Beckenham Place Park. Heroes, every one of you! ☀️

Huge respect to all our wonderful traders, many of whom had worked all weekend then got up early to brave the scorching temperatures for another day, and to the incredibly hard-working team @beckenhamplace for supporting us again
We’re back at beautiful @beckenhamplacepark on 19th July

📆coming up next:
Sunday 7th June - Summer Vintage Market at Dulwich Picture Gallery🌻
@dulwichgallery 

For details, see the links in bio, or head to our website solastcenturyfair.co.uk

Hope to see you again next month ✨

#solastcenturyvintagefair

Today - Vintage Market at the Mansion, Beckenham Place Park, south east London
🌱🏛☀️
 @beckenhamplace

50 amazing vintage dealers outdoors and inside the Mansion:

Mid 20th-century furniture, lighting, ceramics and homeware, posters, prints, books, records, antique maps and charts, French antiques, textiles, spring vintage fashion, accessories and lots more

Bank Holiday Monday 25th May
10-5pm | Free | Dog friendly | level access

📍The Mansion, Beckenham Place Park, London BR3 1SY

🥙🍪☕️ Great street food, and excellent coffee by @beatsandgrind and brownies from @slatencrumb

🍺🍷The @themansionbarcafe is open, with plenty of cold beer on tap, chilled wine and other drinks
🍹Get an iced drink from the new Spritz Bar, by the cafe entrance.
🍦The Mansion’s ice cream trike is roaming around all day - stop them and buy one!

🎺🥁🐸Live jazz - the brilliant @alvar_treefrogs are busking under the oak tree from midday. Get yourself a cold drink and relax on the grass to the sound of their  park-perfect jazz tunes 🎶

Celebrate the Bank Holiday by coming over to @beckenhamplacepark and find amazing and unusual things to buy, great street food, live music and wonderful buildings and parkland to explore 🌷☀️🏛

⛱️☀️It’s going to be a scorcher, so bring plenty of water, suncream and don’t forget your hat!

Same-day delivery offered by traders, if you want to buy furniture

Travel smart by walking, cycling or using public transport to get there - the car park is small, pricey and fills up quickly (see link in bio with Lewisham’s info on how to get there)

For full details, head to solastcenturyfair.co.uk (links in our bio🔝)

#solastcenturyvintagefair #mysecretlondon 
#beckenhamplacemansion 
#beckenhamplacepark 
#londonvintage

Thanks everyone who came down to Vintage Market at the Mills in south west London last Saturday! ☀️It was great to be back @mertonabbeymills 

Big TY to all our traders, including two new one, specialising in rustic pottery, and exquisite handbags and accessories. Thanks  as well to the Mills team for having us, and the brilliant small businesses based here for their support✨

We’re here every month until September. Add the dates to your calendar now!: 
📍20 June
📍04 July
📍15 August
📍19 September

Find us next:

📆 Bank Holiday Monday 25 May
Beckenham Place Park, BR3
@beckenhamplace

📆 Sunday 7 June
Dulwich Picture Gallery, SE21
@dulwichgallery 
@dpgevents 

🔗 For details of these, and our other events this spring and summer, head to the SLC website solastcenturyfair.co.uk (or tap links in bio)

🌿Hope to see you again soon!

📸 Photos:
Cover by @varius.vintage 
Others by So Last Century

#solastcenturyvintagefair
#vintagemarketdays 
#vintagemarket

Weekends at the mills… ✨

From one-of-a-kind vintage finds to slow afternoons that turn into drinks in the sun 🍹 
It’s more than a market - it’s a whole atmosphere.

The Vintage Market at Merton Abbey Mills takes place monthly. @so_last_century 
Next date: Saturday 20th June 📍

#MertonAbbeyMills #VintageMarketLondon #WimbledonLife #SouthWestLondon #LondonMarkets

Today! - Vintage Market at Merton Abbey Mills 
South Wimbledon / Colliers Wood
@mertonabbeymills 

Vintage traders from across London, the south and further afield, are gathered outside with hundreds of amazing and unusual things to discover and buy. Around the piazza and between the mill buildings find a selection of mid 20th century and vintage furniture, lighting and interior decoration, homeware, original posters, prints, spring fashion, and lots of unusual and unique things to lay you hands on, before anyone else does!

Traders take card payments as well as cash, and will deliver locally if you want to buy something big, like a piece of furniture

Grab a coffee when you arrive, and take a break for lunch from one of the variety of independent eateries on site. There are a couple of pubs on site as well!

FREE ENTRY

Level access throughout. Dog friendly.

📆 Saturday 16 May
⏰ 10-4pm

📍Merton Abbey Mills Watermill Way, South Wimbledon, London SW19 2RD

Getting there:
South Wimbledon tube - 10min walk
Colliers Wood tube - 10min 
Morden Road tram - 12min 4hrs free parking available at M&S and Sainsbury’s, only 3 minutes’ walk away

Full details on So Last Century’s website solastcenturyfair.co.uk (link in bio)

#solastcenturyvintagefair

Flashback to another vibrant Vintage Market at the Mansion in Beckenham Place Park, south east London last Monday!

Thank you everyone who came along, chatted to, and bought from, our bunch of amazing traders 🌼

Big thumbs up again to the briliant team at @beckenhamplace for their support in holding these markets, and to @beckenhamplacepark for laying on the gorgeous scenery! 🌳🏛️🪻🐸

📆 We’re back in Beckenham for the Spring Bank Holiday on Monday 25th May. Don’t miss it - the next isn’t until July!

🚨 check out our next vintage market on 16th May at the wonderful @mertonabbeymills in south Wimbledon, London SW19 2RD 

For details, see our bio for links or head to our website solastcenturyfair.co.uk

Hope to see you again soon! ✨

#solastcenturyvintagefair

This May at the Mansion sees a @so_last_century return for a second time, with the vintage fair popping up at The Mansion on the late May bank holiday Monday.

2026 also marks SLC’s 10th year, so what better time to speak with founder, Alan Old about the past decade of So Last Century.

🕰️👗🧸🏷️🎪

Read our profile in full via our bio link and be sure to come along at the end of the month, Monday 25th May - 10am til 5pm 💖
